attestation_notes: Three import errors caught and corrected: (1) Graduation date for George Mason shifted — resume says Dec 2025, corrected from an earlier draft that listed May 2025; (2) FCEDA role title improved from 'Consultant' to 'Business & Technical Analytics Consultant (PREP)' — the abbreviated title undersells the scope; (3) IT Specialist certification inferred as 'Python basics cert' but is a credentialed Certiport IT Specialist in Python valid through Sep 2030 — skill level was understated.

experience.title: Mortgage Records Management Specialist I
highlights: Managed and audited critical mortgage loan documents within a large-scale financial records system
Processed lien releases and loan lifecycle documentation per federal and state regulations
Utilized document management systems and Excel to track, update, and reconcile mortgage records
Applied terminal digit filing logic and systematic retrieval protocols

experience.title: Facility Supervisor
highlights: Resolved visitor concerns, enforced safety protocols, coordinated with management on operational improvements
Oversaw daily operations, staff coordination, and community event support

experience.title: Food Runner
highlights: Coordinated with kitchen and front-of-house staff for accurate, timely order delivery

experience.title: Lifeguard / Assistant Manager
highlights: Promoted to Assistant Manager after completing advanced certifications
Trained new lifeguards, supervised pool safety, led emergency response, managed daily operational documentation

projects.title: Healthcare Management Database System
highlights: Designed 25-table SQL Server database for healthcare organizations
Built stored procedures, views, UDFs, and triggers to automate core operations
Implemented AES-256 column-level encryption, table partitioning, and Chart.js visualizations
Collaborated with team of 4 using Agile workflow

projects.title: StockForge — Inventory Management System
highlights: Built full-stack desktop inventory app using JavaFX and SQLite
Implemented complete GUI layer and backend business logic
Used GitHub for version control with teammates Tolu and Carolina

projects.title: Business & Technical Analytics Consultant (PREP)
highlights: Analyzed large-scale USPTO patent datasets using AWS (S3, Athena, Lambda)
Built interactive Tableau dashboard with filters to surface tech cluster trends
Presented findings to FCEDA representatives and project leads

projects.title: Madison — DC Metro Job Market Intelligence Tool
highlights: Built multi-agent debate architecture (Agent A: harsh hiring manager, Agent B: candidate advocate, Synthesis Judge)
Deployed as Gradio app to Hugging Face Spaces (drippydenis/madison-job-intel)
Integrates BLS data, NewsAPI, and Kaggle LinkedIn dataset via 14-node n8n workflow
Calls Claude claude-opus-4-6 via Anthropic API for dynamic agent output
